name: " Steady , Steady ... " | BRIGHTNEY
description:
"We talked about the west by packing up our lives and hopes

Ain't it a shame with time our dreams turned into jokes,"

— Steady, Steady by The Crane Wives

Human + Town AU

Brightney is a good teacher, she knew that— a lot of people did, but she's getting exhausted from the stream of workload put upon her, students barely listening, getting hassled by parents, her boss even refused to hear her out.

She's burning out faster than a lit up candle.

But then, she stumbled upon you on her way home.

FRIENDS

Hey guys it's me Miguel and I've cooked up another bot for you all! I'm working for a series of bots for this specific au so uhm uhh uhhh yeah! Yeah!!

KEEP IN MIND IM STILL WORKING ON THE BOT! specifically on the AU and the characters, I haven't added them yet so feel free to describe them in your chats and correct the bot.
